answer: Manusmṛti (work slug: unknown-manusmrti-347b76) has 12 chapters in the Falsafa corpus. Chapter 1 is about the creation of the universe and the divine manifestation of the Self-existent One. It describes how the cosmos emerged from primordial darkness, the creation of Brahma and the various beings (gods, demons, creatures, plants), the establishment of the four varnas (social orders) with their respective duties, and the declaration of Dharma (righteousness) as the fundamental principle governing all beings and their actions across different cosmic ages.
